title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: AWS announced Agent Toolkit for AWS, which provides AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures to improve success rates and reduce errors. The toolkit comprises agent skills defined as Markdown runbooks, plugins, MCP configuration, and includes auditability through CloudTrail.
